scripts.build-target-options: ng build --configuration target-options-test && node -e "const fs = require('fs');const dist = 'dist/sanity-esbuild-app/browser';const indexHtml = fs.readFileSync(dist + '/index.html', 'utf8');const jsFiles = fs.readdirSync(dist).filter(f => f.endsWith('.js'));const mainJs = jsFiles.map(f => fs.readFileSync(dist + '/' + f, 'utf8')).join('');if (!indexHtml.includes('content=\"target-options-test\"')) { console.error('FAIL: indexHtmlTransformer did not inject configuration into index.html'); process.exit(1); }if (!mainJs.includes('target-options-test')) { console.error('FAIL: plugin did not inject buildConfiguration into JS bundle'); process.exit(1); }console.log('PASS: target.configuration is accessible in both plugin and indexHtmlTransformer');"
